description_long: This is an electric guitar with a striking, sculpted body finished in white, featuring deep cutaways and a contoured shape reminiscent of the Ibanez JEM series. The body is fitted with gold hardware, including a bridge and pickups, and the fretboard is adorned with detailed inlays. The headstock is uniquely shaped with a sharp, angular design and houses six tuning pegs in a single row. The guitar's neck is slim and appears to be constructed for fast, comfortable playability. The overall design is modern and aggressive, with a focus on both aesthetics and performance. The instrument is likely constructed from solid wood with metal and plastic components for the hardware and electronics.
description: A white, modern electric guitar with gold hardware, sculpted body, and a distinctive angular headstock. Features detailed fretboard inlays and a sleek, contoured design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the sculpted body, gold bridge, pickups, and the full fretboard with inlays.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the guitar's slim body, neck, and the alignment of the headstock and tuning pegs.
description_view_2: Top-down view displaying the full outline of the body, neck, and headstock, as well as the pickup and bridge arrangement.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile, showing the body thickness, neck, and the back of the headstock.
attribute_headstock_design: Angular, six-in-line tuning pegs, no visible logo, sharp contours
